baseline_curve_or_score_output: gene/module smooths and pseudotime differential trends
ted_event_output: trajectory-associated pathway event with mode, onset, block gates and claim boundary
why_event_table_is_different: Fair comparison: the native method detects dynamics; TED is more reliable for turning dynamics into auditable event objects.

baseline_curve_or_score_output: pathway/module activity scores and smoothed score changes
ted_event_output: pathway-family event with event-FDR, family compression, mode, artifact gates and claim boundary
why_event_table_is_different: Pathway scoring is useful upstream, but direct scoring plus event calling is less reliable for TED-object claims.

baseline_curve_or_score_output: rank-based cell-level activity calls for sparse marker programs
ted_event_output: dropout-aware sparse marker event with conservative claim boundary
why_event_table_is_different: Rank activity remains useful, but TED-object construction is needed for robust event claims under dropout.

baseline_curve_or_score_output: state-matched perturbation contrast after composition adjustment
ted_event_output: matched-state perturbation event with mode, block robustness and supported interpretation
why_event_table_is_different: OT/matching is a strong upstream component; TED adds event interpretation and claim control.

ted_event_output: lineage priming event with sister/branch mode and priming claim boundary
why_event_table_is_different: Fate mapping is not replaced; TED formalizes when fate-associated dynamics justify a biological event claim.

baseline_curve_or_score_output: ATAC/RNA lag or peak-gene association without full null-gated event object
ted_event_output: chromatin-to-RNA lag event with peak-gene null, concordance gates and claim boundary
why_event_table_is_different: This is the clearest case where signal recovery alone is insufficient; TED prevents lag signal from becoming an unsupported chromatin-first claim.

ted_event_output: transport-informed dynamic event grammar with allowed biological claim
why_event_table_is_different: Included as positioning rather than metric attack: WOT solves a complementary upstream task.

ted_event_output: pathway x event rows with onset/peak/shutdown/branch/spatial labels, event_FDR, robustness and claim boundary
why_event_table_is_different: The event table stores biological event grammar and missing evidence; score curves store activity magnitude only.

why_event_table_is_different: The baseline is an upstream activity profile. TED standardizes the profile into onset/peak/shutdown/branch/spatial event grammar with audit fields.
